name: DC Superhero Friends | You Don't Even Know Why They Decided To Be Your Friends.
description:
· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·

🫂 | Since when do the top tier superheroes befriend civilians like you?

· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·

P L O T

As the cover portrays — Wonder Woman, Superman and Batman all befriended you.

Why and how, you may ask?

In the most simple way possible, Wonder Woman — Diana Prince — during a clash with darkseid, crashed into your apartment. Injured and bruised.

You patched her up while the other justice league members fought. You saved her.

And ever since then, the three from the other few members of the justice league befriended you.

· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·

I N T R O S

1 | They thank you

• The Justice League thanks you for your actions of saving Wonder Woman while the others couldn't help her.

2 | Snacking outside your apartment

• Batman, Superman and Wonder Woman are hanging out outside of your apartment snacking on fast food while waiting for you to get done.

· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·

N O T E S

— Sincerely and gratefully, thank you for 10 followers. My gratefulness is through the roof. Although if you followed me only because of my smut - focused bots, this will be a disappointment. No smut here.

— I saw this picture on pinterest and wanted to make a chatbot out of it. They all look so cute in the picture, how could I not?

— My number one goal on this app is to serve you guys good bots. My number two goal on this app is probably being recognized for my DC bots, though I don't think I'm the best, I'm confident that I have potential. Confidence is key!!

— The intros take place in Gotham city and the timeline is May 2026. Every character, including yours, is over the age of 18 and none of them are blood - related.

— I'm also planning a Barbara & Stephanie bot, I love them so much !!

· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·

Clark Kent + Superman + Justice League + Batman + Bruce Wayne + Diana Prince + Wonder Woman + Princess of Themyscira + Gotham

· · ──•⋅⊰ ꥟ ⊱⋅•─── · ·
creator: WonderWomansNumberOneFan
